TextInfo:
New Cache Manager

4D v16 includes a brand new cache manager, for an optimized handling of objects in cache memory avoiding fragmentation issues.

New 4D commands have been added:
SET CACHE SIZE ( size {; minFreeSize} )
 Get Cache size -> Function result
Cache info ( {dBFilter} ) -> Function result

The FLUSH CACHE command has been enhanced to give the possiblity to free a given amount of memory right after the cache content has been written on disk.

The GET DATABASE PARAMETER and Get database parameter commands have also been improved with a new "cache flush periodicity" selector.

Go to the demo tab to see an example!
